description_long: This is a three-tiered, round cake with a smooth, white exterior and a minimalist design. Each tier is stacked concentrically, with the largest at the base and the smallest at the top, creating a classic wedding or celebration cake silhouette. Four tall, pastel-colored candles are positioned vertically on the top tier, adding a subtle decorative touch. The cake's surface appears to be covered in a uniform layer of fondant or smooth icing, with no additional embellishments or textures. The overall appearance is clean and modern, with soft edges and a slightly translucent quality to the icing. There is no visible display container or plate beneath the cake.
description: A three-tiered, smooth white cake with four pastel candles on top and a minimalist, modern appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three tiers and four pastel candles clearly on the top tier.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view with the candles still visible, emphasizing the cake's round, tiered structure.
description_view_2: Another rotated angle, with the candles partially aligned and the smooth, white surface of the tiers prominent.
description_view_3: View from the opposite side, with the candles visible in a different arrangement and the cake's clean, tiered form evident.
